results.title: The Sentinels Trailer: Ouassini Embarek, Louis Peres and Jean-Michel Rucheton Starrer The Sentinels Official Trailer
results.description: The Sentinels: Watch the Official Trailer from TV series 'The Sentinels' starring Ouassini Embarek, Louis Peres, Jean-Michel Rucheton and Kacey Mottet Klein. The Sentinels is directed by Edouard Salier and Thierry Poiraud. To know more about The Sentinels Trailer, watch the video. Check out the latest TV series trailers, new web series trailers, trending series videos, and more at ETimes - Times of India Entertainment.

results.title: Entertainment News | Cardi B Turns Heads in Rahul Mishra Couture at Paris Haute Couture Week 2026
results.description: Get latest articles and stories on Entertainment at LatestLY. American rapper Cardi B made one of the biggest fashion statements at Paris Haute Couture Week on July 6, as she took a front-row seat at Indian designer Rahul Mishra's Autumn/Winter 2026/27 presentation.
